creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

There are some plist errors found by poudriere. You can also use
tinderbox, or ports-mgmt/porttools (port test) to see this.

These 2 files were listed in the plist, but were not installed:

pkg: lstat(/usr/local/www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/COPYING): No
such file or directory
pkg: DEVELOPER_MODE: Plist error, missing file:
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/COPYING
pkg: lstat(/usr/local/www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/INSTALL): No
such file or directory
pkg: DEVELOPER_MODE: Plist error, missing file:
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/INSTALL

These files were not listed in the plist:
www/squirrelmail
www/squirrelmail/plugins
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/config_default.php
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/config_example.php
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/configtest.php

www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/docs/INSTALL
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/docs/README
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/docs/index.php
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/expired.php

www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/locale/index.php
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/locale/login_auth.pot
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/logout.php
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/make_release.sh
www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/templates

www/squirrelmail/plugins/login_auth/templates/index.php
